title: senecio clivicola var. clivicola
intro: Senecio clivicola var. clivicola, a plant species in the daisy family, is commonly known as a type of ragwort. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant contains compounds such as pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, providing potential health benefits including reduced inflammation and improved respiratory function. Senecio clivicola var. clivicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity.
